globalNews.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock
globalNews.summary: Ukraine says it has reopened the Druzhba pipeline, after months of stalemate over stalled oil supplies to neighbouring Hungary.

globalNews.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
globalNews.summary: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.

globalNews.title: Mexico officials say Teotihuacán gunman carried material related to US mass shooting
globalNews.summary: The gunman visited the archaeological site repeatedly and appeared to act alone.

globalNews.title: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots taking pictures, report finds
globalNews.summary: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.

globalNews.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
globalNews.summary: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Binance.US cuts spot trading fees to near zero in push to undercut rivals
cryptoNews.summary: The exchange set maker fees at 0% and taker fees at 0.02% across all pairs, extending near-zero pricing to all users with no volume tiers or subscription requirements.

cryptoNews.title: Aave deposits fall by $15B as Kelp exploit sparks flight from DeFi lender
cryptoNews.summary: Aave’s supplied balance has tanked since the Kelp DAO bridge exploit, as users pull funds amid uncertainty over how much of the rsETH-linked shortfall the protocol will ultimately absorb.

cryptoNews.title: UK cracks down on illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading in nationwide raids
cryptoNews.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority has raided eight locations suspected of illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading, issuing cease-and-desist orders.

cryptoNews.title: Europe’s MiCA regime puts smaller crypto firms under pressure
cryptoNews.summary: Smaller crypto companies across Europe face mounting compliance costs as MiCA moves from framework to enforcement, raising fears of market consolidation.

aiNews.title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This start-up wants to figure out which ones matter.
aiNews.summary: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.

aiNews.title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
aiNews.summary: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

aiNews.title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
aiNews.summary: Generative AI is being infused into Google's popular feature within Maps.

aiNews.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
aiNews.summary: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
